label: Mental fit
description: Defines a mental fit that baby or child pawns can experience, specifying the triggered mental state and the mood-based probability curve.

mentalState.label: Mental state
mentalState.description: MentalStateDef that is triggered when this mental fit fires.

mtbDaysMoodCurve.label: MTB days mood curve
mtbDaysMoodCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve mapping mood percentage (0.0 to 1.0) to mean time between fits in in-game days. The fit engine evaluates this curve at the pawn's current mood each tick.

developmentalStageFilter.label: Developmental stage filter
developmentalStageFilter.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (space-separated) restricting which life stages can have this mental fit. Defaults to Child and Adult.

new-mental-fit.label: New mental fit
new-mental-fit.description: Minimal mental fit with a state reference and the default developmental stage filter.
